summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Interexy Lead Analyzer - all backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly. Application successfully processes HeyReach conversations and integrates with OpenAI for lead analysis.
passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/ returns correct message
Backend API: POST /api/run-analysis returns job_id and starts analysis
Backend API: GET /api/status/{job_id} returns correct status fields
Backend API: GET /api/results/{job_id} returns results array
Frontend: Page loads with 'Interexy Lead Analyzer' title
Frontend: 'Run Analysis' button is visible and clickable
Frontend: Empty state shows 'Ready to analyze' message
Frontend: Clicking 'Run Analysis' button shows running state with status text
Frontend: data-testid attributes present on all key elements
Frontend: Design uses light theme with green accent button (#10b981)
Frontend: Progress section appears during analysis with status updates
Frontend: API integration working - successfully fetched 22 conversations from HeyReach
Frontend: Status text updates correctly during analysis phases
